title: Simple Dal Tadka
description: A classic, comforting, and frugal Indian lentil soup. Easy to make and very nutritious.
ingredients: 1 cup Yellow Moong Dal (split yellow lentils)
instructions: Wash the dal thoroughly. Boil the dal in water with turmeric and salt until soft and mushy (about 15-20 minutes).
In a small pan, heat oil. Add cumin seeds and let them splutter.
Add minced garlic (if using) and sauté until golden.
Pour this tadka (tempering) over the cooked dal.
Garnish with coriander leaves and serve with rice or roti.
